behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert on the specific helper name 'createRafWithFallbackTimer' and exact literal 'createRafWithFallbackTimer(window.requestAnimationFrame, 100)', but instruction.md never mentions this helper name or exact call signature.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (background tab RAF throttling) and desired behavior (100ms fallback, single notification) without specifying code-level changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests require the exact helper name 'createRafWithFallbackTimer', the literal 'called' flag variable, and exact string 'createRafWithFallbackTimer(window.requestAnimationFrame, 100)' — alternative correct fixes using different names or inline implementations would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include subprocess calls to yarn test, tsc, and type-tests in addition to text inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_unit_tests_pass and test_full_test_suite run the actual repo test suite which would fail for a stub.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the RAF+setTimeout race, 100ms timeout, deduplication via called flag, and full test suite for regression.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings indicating fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass, and origin comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces TypeScript code, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands (yarn test, src/autoBatchEnhancer.ts, tsc --noEmit) are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file to modify but this is appropriate localization guidance, not line-level leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
